title: Yaju Senpai MOD
body:
# Yaju Senpai MOD
This mod is a joke mod that adds elements related to the Japanese meme **野獣先輩 ( _Yaju Senpai_ )**

## Added elements
- Added a block that makes the voice of **Yaju Senpai**
- Added Exploding or Proliferating **Yaju Senpai** Blocks
- Added equipment and tools for **Yaju Senpai**
- Added items related to **Yaju Senpai**
- Generates the **Yaju Senpai** House as a structure
- Added the **Yaju Senpai** dimension, you can warp from the **Yaju Senpai** House

## Warnings
- Do not install if you do not know Yaju Senpai.
- You may feel sick if you install this mod.
- The world data could be destroyed.

Please back up your world data before installation.
